data.title: Only 25 living survivors of Nanjing Massacre remain as Xiong Shulan, aged 94, passes away - Beijing Review.
data.description: In Beijing on October 10, 2025, it was reported that the count of remaining registered survivors from the 1937-38 Nanjing Massacre dwindled to 25 following the recent passing of Xiong Shulan at 94 years old. This information was relayed by the Memorial Hall of the Victims in the Nanjing Massacre by Japanese Invaders.

data.title: Freight volumes in September 2025: 3.5m lane metres, 0.8% higher than 2024, but 1.2% lower adjusted for route changes. YTD growth rates: 0.2% and -1.2%.
data.description: In September 2025, the total volume of ferry freight reached 3.5 million lane meters, showing a 0.8% increase from the previous year. However, when adjusted for route changes, the volume was 1.2% lower than in 2024. Year-to-date growth rates for the period were 0.2% and -1.2% when considering and adjusting for route changes, respectively.

data.title: CoinEx was a gold sponsor at Taipei Blockchain Week 2025, with personalized photo booth interaction as a highlight. Attracting tens of attendees, the event took place from Sept 4-6 at Taipei's Songshan Cultural and Creative Park.
data.description: In Hong Kong on October 10, 2025, Taipei Blockchain Week 2025 (TBW) wrapped up after running from September 4th to 6th at Taipei's Songshan Cultural and Creative Park. Being a leading yearly event for Asia's cryptocurrency, blockchain, and AI industries, the conference drew in tens of participants.

data.title: BTC’s Mayer Multiple implies price could reach $180K before becoming 'overbought,' staying near ‘oversold’ at ATH.
data.description: During its recent record peaks, Bitcoin was observed to be nearing an "oversold" territory, indicated by the Mayer Multiple. This metric pointed towards a possible price objective of $180,000 for the cryptocurrency.
